info.text: You gotta ante up and play your hand to see how life responds.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: There are no winners or losers, but showing up is what really matters.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Get dirty and run til you're breathless, cause you're the captain of your team.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The only trophy you get in life that matters is when you take your final breath, so keep going.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You many foul out, get a red card, spend time in the penalty box, but you gotta keep going out there and playing your best.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We must be careful not to get caught up in the game.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We must be careful not to get caught up in the game because in the end it's all about having fun.
